## Validation

- [ ] `.venv/bin/ruff check src tests`

- [ ] Not applicable, docs-only change

## Retrace Surface

- [ ] Capture / SDK
- [ ] Detection
- [ ] Replay issue processing
- [ ] Local UI
- [ ] Test generation
- [ ] Code matching / fix prompts
- [ ] Self-hosting / operations
- [ ] Documentation / contributor experience

## Notes

- Link related replay issue IDs, generated spec IDs, or fix prompt artifacts when relevant.
- Redact API keys, user data, replay payload secrets, and private repository contents.
